summary: Scene-level error reporting and retry flow testing complete. All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working with ScriptOverview showing scene tabs, cost summary bar, and action bar. Error handling code properly categorizes errors (402/429/503/504/500) and frontend maps them to user-facing labels.

Backend: POST /api/analyze/scene returns 400 for whitespace-only text - PASS
Backend: /api/analyze/scene endpoint exists and accessible - PASS
Backend: Error code mapping (402=budget, 429=rate, 503=service, 504=timeout, 500=generic) - PASS
Frontend: App.js maps status codes to errorType strings (402->budget_exceeded, 429->rate_limited, 503->service_unavailable, 504->timeout, no response->network_error) - PASS
Frontend: isFailed helper function checks for 'failed-' prefix - PASS
Frontend: Failed scene tabs have red styling (text-red classes) - PASS

Frontend: Retry button has data-testid='retry-scene-button' - PASS

Frontend: handleRetryScene calls /api/analyze/scene - PASS

Frontend: Retry button shows Loader2 spinner with animate-spin - PASS
Frontend: Retry button shows RotateCcw icon when not retrying - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py (lines 1507-1519): Error categorization correctly maps exceptions to HTTP status codes - 402 for budget exceeded, 429 for rate limit, 503 for service unavailable, 504 for timeout, 500 for generic errors
Backend server.py (line 1474): gpt_timeout set to 55s to stay under proxy timeout (~60s)
Frontend App.js (lines 198-242): Error classification in catch block correctly maps status codes to errorType strings with specific error messages
Frontend App.js (lines 320-345): handleRetryScene function properly calls /api/analyze/scene and updates scriptData on success
Frontend ScriptOverview.jsx (line 45): isFailed helper correctly checks for 'failed-' prefix in breakdown id
Frontend ScriptOverview.jsx (lines 88-115): Scene tabs correctly apply red styling for failed scenes with AlertTriangle icon
Frontend ScriptOverview.jsx (line 173): Action bar correctly hidden for failed scenes with !isFailed(activeBreakdown) conditional
Frontend ScriptOverview.jsx (lines 275-340): Failed scene retry card properly renders error badge, message, retry button, and expandable scene text preview
seed_data_creation: Test script with 2 scenes analyzed for SARAH character
context_for_next_testing_agent: Error handling and retry flow fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Backend returns specific HTTP status codes (402=budget, 429=rate limit, 503=service unavailable, 504=timeout, 500=other) with descriptive messages. 2) Frontend App.js maps these to errorType strings (budget_exceeded, rate_limited, service_unavailable, timeout, network_error, backend_error). 3) ScriptOverview shows failed scene tabs with red styling and AlertTriangle icon. 4) Failed scene card (data-testid='failed-scene-card') displays error type badge, error message, and Retry button (data-testid='retry-scene-button'). 5) Action bar is hidden for failed scenes. 6) handleRetryScene replaces failed placeholder on success. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_error_handling_retry.py covers all error handling code paths.

frontend_error_classification.details: App.js catch block maps status codes to errorType strings

failed_scene_tabs.details: Red styling with text-red classes and AlertTriangle icon

failed_scene_card.details: data-testid='failed-scene-card' with error badge, message, retry button

retry_button.details: data-testid='retry-scene-button' with Loader2 spinner while retrying

action_bar_hidden.details: !isFailed(activeBreakdown) conditional hides action bar for failed scenes

handle_retry_scene.details: Calls /api/analyze/scene and updates scriptData on success

cost_summary_bar.details: data-testid='cost-summary-bar' shows scene count and estimated cost
